title: Fitness Coaching Platform
persona: Independent fitness coaches and their clients
narrative: A coach signs up, creates training programs, assigns them to clients, tracks progress, and adjusts based on results.

activities.title: Sign up and set up
activities.description: I create my coach profile and connect my clients

activities.title: Build programs
activities.description: I create reusable training programs with exercises and progressions

activities.title: Assign to clients
activities.description: I assign programs to individual clients with customizations

activities.title: Track progress
activities.description: I see how my clients are doing and where they're struggling

activities.title: Adjust and grow
activities.description: I modify programs based on results and expand my client base

releases.label: MVP
releases.goal: A coach can create a program and assign it to a client — proving the core workflow end-to-end.

releases.label: Client engagement
releases.goal: Clients can log workouts and see their progress — the loop between coach and client is closed.

releases.label: Data-driven coaching
releases.goal: Coaches can make data-driven decisions: progress charts, plateaus detection, and program adjustments are all visible.

releases.label: Scale
releases.goal: Coaches can manage 50+ clients efficiently with templates, bulk actions, and automated check-ins.

stories.title: Clone and modify program for client
Bulk assign program to multiple clients
